hero.title: We build websites that
hero.description: Tek Dünyası creates modern, fast, and professional websites that help small and medium businesses establish a powerful online presence and attract more customers.

services.label: Services
services.title: Everything you need to go online
services.description: From design to launch and beyond, we provide end-to-end web development services tailored to your business needs.
services.pageTitle: Web solutions for every business need
services.pageDescription: We offer a complete range of web development services to help your business succeed online. From initial design to ongoing support.

business-website.title: Business Website Development
business-website.shortDescription: Custom-built websites designed to establish your brand online and convert visitors into customers.
business-website.fullDescription: We build professional, high-performing websites tailored to your business goals. From company pages to complex multi-page sites, every detail is crafted to represent your brand and drive results.
benefits: Custom design that matches your brand identity
Fast loading speeds for better user experience

website-redesign.title: Website Redesign
website-redesign.shortDescription: Transform your outdated website into a modern, high-performing digital experience.
website-redesign.fullDescription: Is your website looking dated or underperforming? We redesign existing websites to meet modern standards — improving aesthetics, performance, and user experience while preserving your brand identity and SEO value.

landing-page.title: Landing Page Design
landing-page.shortDescription: High-converting landing pages designed to capture leads and drive specific actions.
landing-page.fullDescription: We create focused, conversion-optimized landing pages for your marketing campaigns, product launches, or lead generation efforts. Every element is strategically placed to guide visitors toward your desired action.
benefits: Fast load times for lower bounce rates

speed-optimization.title: Website Speed Optimization
speed-optimization.shortDescription: Make your website lightning fast to improve user experience and search rankings.
speed-optimization.fullDescription: Slow websites lose visitors and rankings. We analyze your website's performance bottlenecks and implement proven optimization techniques to dramatically improve load times, Core Web Vitals, and overall user experience.

seo-setup.title: SEO Setup
seo-setup.shortDescription: Get found online with a solid SEO foundation that drives organic traffic to your website.
seo-setup.fullDescription: We set up your website with comprehensive on-page SEO best practices — from meta tags and structured data to sitemap generation and search engine submission. Start ranking for the keywords that matter to your business.
benefits: Meta tags and structured data setup

website-maintenance.title: Website Maintenance
website-maintenance.shortDescription: Keep your website secure, updated, and running smoothly with ongoing maintenance support.
website-maintenance.fullDescription: Your website needs regular attention to stay secure and perform well. We provide ongoing maintenance services including updates, security monitoring, performance optimization, and content changes so you can focus on running your business.
benefits: Uptime monitoring and quick issue resolution

portfolio.title: Our recent work
portfolio.description: Take a look at some of the projects we've delivered for our clients.
portfolio.pageDescription: Every project is an opportunity to create something meaningful. Here's a selection of the websites we've designed and developed.

seo.description: Built-in SEO best practices help your website rank higher in search results and attract more organic traffic.

secure.description: We implement security best practices and use reliable hosting solutions to keep your website safe and online.

support.description: We don't just build and leave. We provide ongoing support and maintenance to ensure your website stays in top shape.

process.label: Our Process
process.title: From idea to launch in 4 steps
process.description: Our streamlined process ensures your project is delivered on time and exceeds expectations.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.description: We start by understanding your business, goals, and target audience. This helps us create a clear roadmap for your project.

design.title: Design
design.description: We create a custom design that reflects your brand identity and provides the best user experience for your visitors.

development.description: Our developers bring the design to life using modern technologies, ensuring your website is fast, responsive, and secure.

cta.title: Ready to build your dream website?

about.pageDescription: We're passionate about helping businesses succeed online through modern, high-performing websites.
about.storyTitle: Building the digital future, one website at a time

story.p1: Tek Dünyası — meaning "Tech World" in Turkish — was founded with a simple mission: to help small and medium businesses establish a powerful online presence without the complexity and high costs often associated with web development.
story.p2: I started Tek Dünyası because I saw too many businesses struggling with outdated, slow, and unresponsive websites that were hurting rather than helping their growth. I believed every business deserves a modern, professional website that truly represents their brand.
story.p3: Today, we focus on building websites that are not just visually stunning, but also fast, SEO-friendly, and designed to convert visitors into customers.
story.p4: Our approach is simple: understand your business, design with purpose, build with precision, and deliver results that matter. We treat every project as a partnership, working closely with you to create something you're truly proud of.

about.valuesDescription: These core principles guide everything we do.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: We never cut corners. Every website we build is crafted with attention to detail, clean code, and best practices.

client.title: Client-Focused
client.description: Your success is our success. We work closely with you throughout the process to ensure the final result exceeds expectations.

results.title: Results-Driven
results.description: We build websites with purpose — designed to convert visitors, improve rankings, and drive real business growth.

technology.title: Modern Technology
technology.description: We use the latest technologies and frameworks to build websites that are fast, secure, and ready for the future.

about.techDescription: We use industry-leading technologies to build modern, scalable, and high-performing websites.

greenleaf-organic.description: An e-commerce store for organic products with a clean design, product filtering, and seamless checkout flow.

nova-consulting.description: A professional consulting firm website with case studies, team profiles, and a booking system for initial consultations.

sarah.content: Tek Dünyası transformed our online presence completely. Our new website is fast, beautiful, and our customers love it. We've seen a 40% increase in online inquiries since launch.

david.content: Professional, responsive, and incredibly talented. The team delivered a website that perfectly represents our brand. The attention to detail and communication throughout the process was outstanding.

emily.content: Working with Tek Dünyası was a game-changer for our restaurant. The website they built is stunning, loads instantly, and has significantly improved our reservation bookings.
